topic: Every morning there is an extra pair of shoes by my front door that fits me perfectly
title: Every Morning There Is an Extra Pair of Shoes by My Front Door. They Fit Me Perfectly. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There is a pair of shoes by my front door every morning. They are not mine.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a worn pair of leather shoes neatly placed on a doormat just inside an apartment front door, dim entryway light, a deadbolt visible on the door above, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I live alone. Ground floor apartment. One deadbolt, always locked from inside.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a small ground floor apartment entryway at night, a single front door with a deadbolt, a coat rack, dim ceiling light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I line my own shoes up every night.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of two pairs of shoes lined up neatly against a baseboard wall in a dim hallway, low warm lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The first morning there was a worn pair of brown work boots set beside them.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a pair of scuffed brown leather work boots placed beside newer shoes on a doormat, low morning light through a frosted door window, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I threw them in the dumpster.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an apartment dumpster in an alley at dawn, the lid open, a pair of brown boots resting on top of garbage bags, grey overcast light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next morning the same boots were back. The dumpster was empty.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of the same brown work boots back on the entry doormat, faint morning light, dust motes in the air, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a hand reaching down toward a pair of worn boots on a wooden floor, dim entry light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: They fit me exactly. Like they were always mine.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of feet wearing worn brown boots standing on a doormat, viewed from above, dim entry light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every morning a new pair. Always worn. Always my size. Always facing the door.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot down a dim apartment hallway lined with many pairs of worn shoes all facing the front door, single overhead bulb, deep shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last week the newest pair was muddy, the soles still wet, like someone had just walked in.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a pair of muddy boots on a doormat with wet soles leaving a faint print on the floor, low morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I started counting. Sixty pairs now, lined down my hallway.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a long apartment hallway with dozens of pairs of worn shoes lined along both baseboards receding into shadow, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each pair is more worn than the last. Someone is wearing my life out.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a single pair of badly worn shoes with split soles on a doormat by a closed front door at night, dim hall light, vertical 9:16 framing
